'''Zeloa''' was a planet located in the [[Zel system]], in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==Description==
Zeloa was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located in the Inner Rim, the outermost of the [[Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> It had 14 moons.<ref name="ZPP" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zeloa was first mentionned in the article [[Zeltros: Pleasure Planet]] on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website, compiled by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[January 5]], [[2004]].<ref name="ZPP" />
